summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The GraniteShares Autocallable HOOD ETF (AHD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed, investing in a laddered portfolio of single-stock autocallable options referencing the price of Robinhood Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) AHD was launched on May 19, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.
